new_findings.pattern: I was using my card at the ATM, and it just got stuck!
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about an ATM issue does not appear in the real batch.

new_findings.pattern: I just tried to make a purchase, and my card was declined.
new_findings.rationale: This exact structure regarding a declined purchase is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: I noticed an extra charge on my card.
new_findings.rationale: This phrasing about noticing an extra charge is not found in the real batch.
